---
title: "Replication matters - also in sociological research"
date: 2018-03-09
subtitle: "A comment by the LMU OSC members Katrin Auspurg and Josef Brüderl"
categories: ["Publications"]

template: templates/news-template.html
filters:
  - templates/process-news-yaml.lua
---

<p>A comment by the LMU OSC members <a href="/people/people/katrin-auspurg.qmd" title="Auspurg">Katrin Auspurg</a> and <a href="/people/people/josef-bruederl.qmd" title="Brüderl">Josef Brüderl</a> on a recent debate on replicability in social science research, that will be published in "Forschung &amp; Lehre 4/2018 (in German). The preprint can be found here: <a href="https://akademie-soziologie.de/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/20180308_Stellungnahme-zu-Replikation.pdf">https://akademie-soziologie.de/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/20180308_Stellungnahme-zu-Replikation.pdf</a></p>
<div class="g-clear"></div>
